Provenance.description:
Tracks how artifact content was produced and its review state.

This is central to APLH's knowledge governance: every piece of content
must declare its origin and confidence level so that reviewers can
assess trustworthiness.

source_refs.description: List of source document references (document IDs, URLs, etc.)
source_refs.title: Source Refs

method.description: Description of the production method (e.g., 'extracted by Gemini 3.1 Pro from CCAR-33 §33.28')
method.title: Method

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer identity (empty if not yet reviewed)
reviewed_by.title: Reviewed By

review_date.description: ISO date of review (empty if not yet reviewed)
review_date.title: Review Date

Provenance.title: Provenance

ProvenanceSourceType.description: How the artifact content was produced.
ProvenanceSourceType.title: ProvenanceSourceType

description: Operating mode artifact for propulsion control logic.

description.description: What this mode represents and when it is active
description.title: Description

mode_type.description: Mode classification: normal | degraded | emergency | startup | shutdown | test
mode_type.title: Mode Type

parent_mode.description: MODE-xxxx ID of the parent mode (empty = top-level)
parent_mode.title: Parent Mode

is_initial.description: Whether this mode is the initial/default mode at power-on
is_initial.title: Is Initial

entry_conditions.description: Human-readable summary of conditions that cause entry into this mode
entry_conditions.title: Entry Conditions

exit_conditions.description: Human-readable summary of conditions that cause exit from this mode
exit_conditions.title: Exit Conditions

active_functions.description: FUNC-xxxx IDs of functions active in this mode
active_functions.title: Active Functions

monitored_interfaces.description: IFACE-xxxx IDs of interfaces monitored in this mode
monitored_interfaces.title: Monitored Interfaces

related_requirements.description: REQ-xxxx IDs related to this mode
related_requirements.title: Related Requirements

related_abnormals.description: ABN-xxxx IDs that may trigger entry/exit of this mode
related_abnormals.title: Related Abnormals

incoming_transitions.description: TRANS-xxxx IDs of transitions whose target_mode is this mode
incoming_transitions.title: Incoming Transitions

outgoing_transitions.description: TRANS-xxxx IDs of transitions whose source_mode is this mode
outgoing_transitions.title: Outgoing Transitions

title: Mode
